hooks.command: cmd=$(echo "$ARGUMENTS" | jq -r '.command // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "$ARGUMENTS"); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(push --force|push -f |reset --hard|clean -f|drop table|DROP TABLE|db\.delete\([^)]+\)$)' && { echo '[GUARD] Blocked: destructive command detected. Ask the user first.'; exit 1; } || exit 0

file=$(echo "$ARGUMENTS" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "$ARGUMENTS"); [ -f "$file" ] && pnpm prettier --config .prettierrc.base.json --write --ignore-unknown "$file" 2>/dev/null || true

cd /home/user/react-app-starter && changes=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l); [ "$changes" -gt 0 ] && echo "[SESSION] $changes changed file(s) not committed. Run: git status" || echo '[SESSION] Working tree clean.'
